auth.access_expired: Your access period has expired. Please contact the administrator to renew your subscription.
auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.brand_tagline: Sales, inventory, and accounting — everything your shop needs in one place.
auth.contact_admin: Need an account? Contact your administrator.

products_page.quantity_hint: Positive to add stock, negative to remove it
products_page.adjustment_failed: Adjustment failed — check the quantity does not exceed available stock.
products_page.price_after_create_hint: Pricing is set after the product is created — use the pricing icon on the products list to set a fixed price or an auto margin over cost.
products_page.create_failed: Could not save the product. Check the SKU is unique and the details are valid.
products_page.subtitle: Your catalog with live stock levels across warehouses.
products_page.search_placeholder: Search by name, SKU, or barcode…
products_page.margin_hint: The sale price will auto-update from the latest purchase cost using this margin.
products_page.pricing_save_failed: Could not update pricing. Please check the values and try again.
products_page.delete_failed: Could not delete the product. Please try again.
products_page.update_failed: Could not save the changes. Check the details and try again.
products_page.profit_hint: The price is set so this percentage of the final selling price is profit — e.g. 20% profit means 20% of what the customer pays is your margin.
products_page.auto_priced_tooltip_profit: Auto-priced for {{margin}}% profit of the selling price

purchases_page.title: New Purchase
purchases_page.create_failed: Could not create purchase — check the form values.
purchases_page.subtitle: Track supplier purchases, receipts, and invoices
purchases_page.receive_failed: Could not receive the purchase. Please try again.
purchases_page.receive_pay_hint: Grand total: {{amount}}. Optionally pay the supplier now — the rest stays on their ledger.
purchases_page.landed_cost_estimated_hint: Estimated — the final amount is set once this purchase is received.
purchases_page.landed_cost_expense_hint: Adding a landed cost here creates a categorized expense paid from the cash resource you choose — it will show up in Expenses and be split across the items above when this purchase is received.

pos_page.checkout_failed: Could not complete sale — check stock levels and tender amounts.
pos_page.scan_placeholder: Scan or type the barcode, then press Enter
pos_page.scan_hint: Point the barcode scanner here — each scan adds the product to the sale.
pos_page.empty_cart: Tap products or scan a barcode to start the sale.
pos_page.walk_in_must_pay: A walk-in sale must be fully paid before completing.

expenses_page.landed_cost_checkbox: Landed cost (adds to a draft purchase's stock cost)
expenses_page.save_failed: Could not save expense — check a draft purchase is selected for landed costs.
expenses_page.subtitle: Record spending and export category-wise reports

employees_page.subtitle: Staff, salaries, advances and statements
employees_page.search_placeholder: Search by name, role or phone…

payroll_page.run_exists: A payroll run for that period may already exist.
payroll_page.subtitle: Monthly payroll runs and payslips
payroll_page.wa_message: Payroll report {{period}} from {{company}} — total net pay {{total}}
payroll_page.date_hint: Payroll runs for the month of the selected date.

period_closing_page.close_failed: Could not close period — check the dates do not overlap an already closed period.
period_closing_page.subtitle: Close accounting periods to lock the books, and reopen them if you need to make corrections
period_closing_page.no_closings: No periods have been closed yet
period_closing_page.no_operations: No operations were recorded for this period
period_closing_page.reopen_failed: Could not reopen this period — only the most recently closed period can be reopened.

reports_page.subtitle: Financial reports across the whole business — printable, downloadable, and shareable via WhatsApp

settings_page.password_update_failed: Could not update password — check your current password is correct.

users_page.title: User Management
users_page.subtitle: Create POS users and manage their roles, status and access.
users_page.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
users_page.save_failed: Could not save the user. Check the details and try again.
users_page.extend_confirm: Extend access for {{name}} by one more year? The yearly fee is collected in cash.
users_page.one_year_note: The new account will have access for one year from today. It can be extended later against a cash payment.
users_page.business_hint: The staff account works inside this business
users_page.admin_founds_business: An Admin account creates its own new business with separate data

parties.opening_balance_hint_customer: Amount this customer already owes you (optional)
parties.opening_balance_hint_supplier: Amount you already owe this supplier (optional)
parties.create_failed: Could not save. Check the details and try again.

customers_page.subtitle: Your customers with live balances and full transaction ledgers.

ledger.title: Ledger — {{name}}
ledger.debit_hint: Red = amount the customer took on credit (balance goes up)
ledger.credit_hint: Green = payment received from the customer (balance goes down)
ledger.clear_confirm: All current entries for {{name}} will be moved out of the ledger view. Nothing is deleted — the history stays in the system log and can be shown again with "Show cleared history".
ledger.clear_note: This is only possible because the balance is exactly zero. The action is recorded in the system activity log with your name.
ledger.clear_blocked: The ledger can only be cleared when the balance is zero.
ledger.wa_message: Dear {{name}}, please find your account statement from {{company}}. {{summary}}.
ledger.debit_hint_customer: Red = amount the customer took on credit (they owe more)
ledger.credit_hint_customer: Green = payment received from the customer (they owe less)
ledger.debit_hint_supplier: Green = payment you made to the supplier (you owe less)
ledger.credit_hint_supplier: Red = purchased on credit from the supplier (you owe more)

suppliers_page.subtitle: Your suppliers with live balances and full transaction ledgers.

stocks_page.title: Stocks
stocks_page.subtitle: Available stock across all warehouses and items that need reordering
stocks_page.search_placeholder: Search by name, SKU or barcode…
stocks_page.no_stock: No stock records match your filters

sales_page.subtitle: Every sale made across the shop, with invoices, filters, and returns.
sales_page.search_placeholder: Search by invoice number or customer…
sales_page.return_whole_confirm: Return the entire sale "{{invoice}}"? Stock, cash, and the customer's balance will all be reversed.
sales_page.return_partial_hint: Select the items and quantities being returned — the rest of the sale stays as-is. Stock, cash, and profit are adjusted for only what's returned.
sales_page.return_failed: Could not process the return. Please try again.
sales_page.nothing_to_return: Everything on this sale has already been returned.
